task.title: How to Remove a Pop-Up Stopper?
task.shortdesc: A quick and simple tutorial on drain stopper removal.

taskbody.context:
Learn how to unplug a pop up stopper in order to start the unclogging process.
Materials Needed:WrenchAny item able to fit in between the sink and stopper

step.cmd: First, locate the ball rod connected to the drain pipe under the sink. You can find a nut that is used to hold the ball rod.
The nut can be loosened by hand. But if unable to do so, use a wrench to help loosen. When the nut is unscrewed, a ball called the pivot ball is revealed to be lodged inside the pipe.

Before taking out the rod, make sure to wedge something in between the stopper and the sink to prevent the stopper from falling into the drain. In this example, a screwdriver was used to create an opening.
After your stopper is secured, go back to the ball rod, push it down, and proceed to pull it out. The rod should come out fairly easy without having to exert much force.
Take the rod out of the pipe. If any debris is stuck onto the rod, make sure to get rid of it as well as any debris that can be seen in the pipe hole.

taskbody.result: After these 5 steps, you should be able to now fully lift the stopper out of the drain without any issue. Just make sure to insert the ball rod back into the pipe and screw the nut shut tight to prevent any leaks.

link.linktext: Learn how to remove a push and pull drain stopper.
Learn how to remove a lift and twist drain stopper.
